title: Service of appraisal required
doc_html:
§181.  Service of appraisal required

A copy of the appraisal shall be served upon each party to the action together with a notice that the appraisal may be homologated after the expiration of fifteen days from the date of service.  

Acts 1974, No. 50, §181, eff. Jan. 1, 1975.
doc_text:
§181.  Service of appraisal required
